title: Manufacturing Engineer - Dalmia Bharat - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Dalmia Bharat - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
We at Dalmia Bharat are looking for an experienced Manufacturing Engineer based out of Faridabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Dalmia Bharat:
Dalmia Bharat is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dalmia Bharat!
